_comment: matador-miner FULL config reference (NVIDIA / CUDA). Every value below is the built-in DEFAULT, except the SET-THESE block (payoutaddress is required). You can delete any line to use its default. Docs: docs/matador-standalone-ops.md . The dev fee is a fixed 1% and is not configurable here.
_solo_only: used only when mode=solo (point at your own btxd) - DEFAULTS shown
_fallback: solo->pool failover - DEFAULTS shown (empty fallback_pool = disabled)
_idle_gate: mine only when the box is idle - DEFAULTS shown (empty command = always mine)

api._comment: read-only status API - DEFAULTS shown (on by default, loopback)

watchdog._comment: pool reject/stall watchdog (safe reconnect only) - DEFAULTS shown

thermal._comment: warning-only GPU temp/power monitor (never changes clocks/fans) - DEFAULTS shown
